title: 4PCS Jar Opener Gripper Pad, Silicone Jar Openers 5 Inch Square Multi-function Anti-Slip Coasters Bottle Jar Opener, Jar Lid Openers for Opening Cans Jars in Summer(Gray)
description:
What you will receive: You will receive 4 pieces of 5-inch square gray silicone jar opener gripper pads, plenty of quantity and suitable size, you can use it as more than just a can opener; can also be used as insulated coasters on the table.
Premium material: These jar and bottle openers are made of high-quality silicone, flexible and durable, resistant to twisting, not easy to tear or break, high temperature resistant, textured design with excellent anti-slip function. Surface stains on silicone clips are easily removed and are dishwasher safe.
Easy to use: These jar grippers for opening jars are very convenient and easy to use. Simply place the bottle opener over the lid of the jar you want to open, twist the jar as usual, and the jar will open easily. This jar clip pad is small, lightweight, easy to carry and easy to use when traveling, perfect for the elderly and people with weak hands.
Good helper for opening lids: These jar clip pads have a textured surface design that can create greater friction with jar lids, and then, they have strong grip, allowing women, the elderly, and people with weak hands to open jar lids easily.
Wide application: These silicone bottle opener gripper pads have multiple uses, not only can be used as bottle openers to open the lids of bean cans, beverage bottles, airtight containers, but also can be used as kitchen place-mats, insulated coasters or anti-scald handles pad to avoid burning your hands. At the same time, these jar opener gripper pads are also a good home decoration that can add some bright colors to the kitchen.
reviews_5s: Whether you’re a senior or even younger, these are a must have to use not only in the kitchen for gripping and opening jars but for lots of other things. I bought a set of these for my sister who didn’t think she’d use them until she was trying to get the back off her bedroom tv remote to change the batteries. Lo and behold this gripper pad is the only thing that worked. Now she keeps one in her nightstand drawer as well as in her kitchen. Pretty neat item to have!These work so well! Easy to use and storeMade of the right thickness and material to easily grip and assist in getting a lid off! Good quality.Perfect size for opening jars and cups. It has a lot of grip and is a great help for my painful hands.Just received. Worked with first try, on an unopened salad dressing bottle. Has great grip, no slipping. Thin material, will see how it holds up. Have used only once so far. Product looks just like photos. 4 pieces.These are perfect, and they came fast, very reasonably priced
